errors.invalid_ip_address: Set a valid IPv4 address for the computer.
errors.invalid_mac_address: Set a valid MAC address for the computer.
errors.invalid_ssh_port: Set a valid SSH port for the computer.
errors.invalid_wol_broadcast_address: Set a valid Wake-on-LAN broadcast address.
errors.missing_ssh_username: Set the SSH username before shutting down the computer.
errors.missing_ssh_password: Set the SSH password before shutting down the computer.
errors.shutdown_timeout: Timed out while waiting for the computer to turn off.
errors.ssh_shutdown_failed: Failed to shut down the computer over SSH.
errors.startup_failed: Failed to send the Wake-on-LAN packet.

warnings.ssh_unavailable: Computer responds to ping, but SSH is unavailable. Check the SSH service, port, firewall, or credentials.
